subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath adorned the Book of Existence with His Name, the Hidden, the Treasured, the Protected, the One manifest through His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی زین کتاب الوجود باسمه المکنون المخزون المصون الظاهر باسمه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
